MAINTAINER=    rscheckelhoff@fourcalorieservers.com--5aq3lLW93rYPluoNf6RTBjpK6zeqHZH0NIfhlCVE1PfjbSpj

diff -u -r /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/xscoopold/Makefile /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/xscoop/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/xscoopold/Makefile  2008-01-25 14:30:51.000000000 +0000
+++ /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/xscoop/Makefile     2008-01-25 14:40:03.000000000 +0000
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:   xscoop
 # Date created:                                Sa 04 Nov 2005 00:00:00 MET DST
-# Whom:                                        Ron Scheckelhoff <rscheckelhoff@yahoo.com>
+# Whom:                                        Ron Scheckelhoff <rscheckelhoff@fourcalorieservers.com
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/x11-toolkits/xscoop/Makefile,v 1.8 2007/01/08 23:12:12 miwi Exp $
 #
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 PORTNAME=      xscoop
 PORTVERSION=   1.0.2
 CATEGORIES=    x11-toolkits
-MASTER_SITES=  ftp://ftp.datazygte.com/ports/x11-toolkits/xscoop/ \
+MASTER_SITES=  http://www.fourcalorieservers.com/ports/x11-toolkits/xscoop/ \
                http://people.tecnik93.com/~itetcu/FreeBSD/others_ports/${PORTNAME}/sources/
